name: domotz-preview
description: Monitor and manage your network infrastructure through natural language.

interface.shortDescription: Monitor and manage your network infrastructure through natural language.
interface.longDescription: Monitor and manage your network infrastructure through natural language. Query devices, check alerts, inspect metrics, manage configurations, and control power across all your sites. Requires a Domotz account enabled to the MCP Preview program.
defaultPrompt: Summarize the current network state in Domotz
